title: メジロという名の物語

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see everyone is here. Bright, Ryan, Palmer,
Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait... Ramonu and Ardan appear to be missing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They're not coming today. Ramonu's abroad and
Ardan's still recovering.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Well then, let us begin. I trust you are all
aware that the autumn Tenno Sho is approaching.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thus, it is time to begin another Mejiro family
conference. Our topic for today is whether Bright
can defeat Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ensuing conference is so energized and
heated, it would give the summer sun a run for its
money...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I ran against her at the Takarazuka Kinen. If
you're going to beat her, it's going to take
something extraordinary.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She runs so far ahead, calling her a front
runner is a total understatement. Her speed is off
the chain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. So, we won't even have a chance unless we
pull off something massive. Maybe we should bust
out a new Mejiro style.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A new Mejiro style... Those words do have a
lovely ring.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Let's discuss this further. What is the Mejiro style?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How about we all share at once the quality we
believe is quintessentially Mejiro?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All together now! Three, two, one!

text_block_list.name: All Five Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Long-distance!
Explosive front running! ☆
Dash strength!
Guts?
Um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone calls out their answers without reserve.
It's hard to believe their images of the Mejiro
family are all so different...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, are you all taking this seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Of course we are. It's just difficult to sum up us
Mejiros in one word. We're all pretty different.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Still, we must have something in common, yes?
What you mentioned before...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A Mejiro style! There must be one. A style that
can outperform Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Meee?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bright is the one who's going to be racing, after all. She has to share her opinions if we want this conversation to go anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Um, in my opinion, what's most quintessentially
Mejiro...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Are us Mejiros. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heh, Bright... You're not wrong, but is that really
your answer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The Mejiros are the Mejiros. In other
words...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I understand, and I believe you may be onto
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Mejiro Bright's answer struck an
unexpected chord with Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What? McQueen, what do you mean she might be
onto something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you are born a Mejiro, then you are a Mejiro.
But if you are not born a Mejiro, then you are not
a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That is the only constraint there is. Consider it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We each have our own speed, stamina, and
running style. If one has these talents, then you
can improve them, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But only those born as Mejiros have our destiny,
culture, and customs. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro story is ours and ours alone, and that
story we continue to cherish...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Down Mount Yotei and through heavy snow, our
founder trekked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus was the "mother mountain" awoken, and the
earth was saturated with love, giving birth to the
"giants."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, all her children opened their eyes for the
first time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro Umamusume ran. Swift as the wind
across grassy fields, valleys of flowers, deserts,
and snowy plains. Until...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They ran in races, where they stirred the hearts of
many with excitement and emotion, bringing
smiles to their faces.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that is how all the Mejiro Umamusume
became children of light, admired by all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I always loved that story as a kid...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As did I. It's like an heirloom. Even just now, I felt
entranced listening.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I used to lie awake at night thinking about
Ramonu and how she was the first of us to win the
Triple Tiara. She's a Mejiro heroine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't manage a single word when we first
met, I was shaking too hard. Even now, when we
stand on the turf together, I have to fight not to
cry.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have a feeling that everyone here today will end
up becoming just as dazzling as Ramonu
someday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
There are Umamusume out there who admire
McQueen the same way, and I'm sure you'll be
just the same, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That's how our dream continues to live on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. The Mejiros are brought up surrounded
by admiration, love, and pride.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That love specifically is related to the Mejiros'
performance in races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But what does love have to do with running?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I get it... If that's the case, then this conference
we're having right now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan makes a tight fist.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That means we're not just gathered here to help
Bright win, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We're here to ensure the new generation keeps
the Mejiro legacy going, so it doesn't get washed
away with the currents of time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. If we want the esteem surrounding our name
to continue, we must cooperate and give every
ounce we have to Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Every drop of our family's power will be given to
her in the form of a single, piercing "resolution."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This power is unique to the Mejiros. The enduring
bond we share cannot be found among friends or
classmates.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A story that has been passed down in an
unbroken line for generations. I get it now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro story is what each of them build upon
to produce its continued admiration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. You said that the Mejiro style, Bright's
style, can stay as it is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Improve speed without sacrificing her stamina.
Perfect the final stretch. Foster strength in all
areas.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It may be the only choice we have. Yet, focusing
together on this goal and honing Bright's skills
with our individual techniques...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It will be a terrible burden to bear for her. Do you
think she can handle it? Can she perfect a new
Mejiro style?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn away from Mejiro McQueen's pointed stare
and fix my gaze instead on Mejiro Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a graceful smile on her face. Despite the
calm in her expression, I can sense that she has
made up her mind—she'll accept her destiny.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And if she feels that way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My answer is confident. I know that we'll reach
our goal in time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I most certainly can. Everyone, I'll be in your
debt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I will give my utmost, so please, do all you can to
help me shine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright... Yeah! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, her special training begins with each of
her five coaches training her in their own unique
ways.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Bright, work more on your foundation!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You have to step harder. Harder! The weight of
your step equates to the weight of your resolve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooosh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Put your back into it, Bright! Run with all your
muscles, not just the ones in your legs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Move your entire body—push that power into the
earth!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: U-understood!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! I'll teach you my super front running
strategy! Or, I would if I could, that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Actually, maybe I'd be a good substitute for
Suzuka. Let's partner run, Bright. See if you can
catch me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Urk... Cough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Remember, Bright. You're not a burden to us.
We're doing this for the Mejiro family we love.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep on... no matter what it takes. As
Mejiros in the same class, we celebrate together
and we fall together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I understand, Dober...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They form a line and run along the beach. Ryan,
McQueen, Palmer, Dober, then Bright taking up
the rear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching them run is like looking at the history,
and the future, of the Mejiro family.
